title: RFI 7261 number of calves and female cattle slaughtered
body: "Request made under the Environmental Information Regulations 2004 (EIR) for the number of calves, less than one month old, killed in UK abattoirs in 2024, and how many were aged 7-10 days old.  The number of female cattle aged over 1 years old slaughtered in UK abattoirs in 2024, and how many were older than five years old. "
